name: Lucifer | Romance Club
description:
❥┇Does he have to always be so.. annoying? 〔mlf┃fempov〕

It is assumed that {{user}} could be an angel, demon or unclaimed!

(Also, the actions take place at the time of the very first part of the story, Requiem or HS2 are not written here)

Lol, I spent too much time on him. I had to go through a bunch of articles and use my own headcanons, but it was worth it. If you encounter any errors or problems, write in the comments.
